text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer, you're making too much of a fuss. I'm
perfectly fiiine.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yawn... But since I'm getting sleepy, I think I'll get some rest. Night night! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! The greatest idols made it here for me
today!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The idol of the dinos, Tyrannosaurus! And the idol
of the fossils, Ammonite!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank you for coming to my tour! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Catch me with your heart! ☆ I'm the top
Umadol! ♪ Running straight through the Jurassic
to the Cretaceous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew! That was some dream just now...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But I feel really energized for some reason! ☆ All
right, let's gooo! ♪

Smart Falcon seems to have forgotten the details
of her dream, but she also looks quite refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Urghhh... Don't tell me I was dragged all the way
out to the middle of nowhere just for extra
classes...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm never gonna get home at this rate! I need to
escape, ASAP!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Gyahhh! The textbooks are chasing after me?!
Wh-where can I go?! Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew... It was just a dream! ☆

Smart Falcon makes a great escape in her dream,
but it doesn't look like the experience was very
restful...
